methodology_sections: 1. Conservation Laws - Solvency, inflation checks, supply integrity
2. Relationship & Ratio Invariants - Collateralization, rate consistency
3. Economic Monotonicity - Yield accumulation, exchange rate direction
4. Incentive & Game Theoretic Integrity - Attack cost vs profit, slashing
5. Fee & Yield Consistency - Fee accounting, yield distribution

invariants.description: The pool cannot be in both a launched and refunded state simultaneously.
invariants.attack_scenario: If an attacker manages to trigger both launch and refund, they could double-spend the pool's assets, draining both the RAISE_TOKEN and SALE_TOKEN, leaving the protocol insolvent.

invariants.description: The total raised amount must never exceed the configured hard cap.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the hard cap is bypassed, the pool might not have enough SALE_TOKENs to pair with the RAISE_TOKENs during the Uniswap V3 liquidity deployment, causing the launch to fail or diluting investors.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_hard_cap() public view { assert(totalRaised <= saleInfo.hardCap); }

invariants.description: Before launch or refund, the contract's balance of RAISE_TOKEN must be at least the total raised amount.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the contract balance is less than totalRaised, the pool is insolvent and cannot fully refund users or successfully deploy the required liquidity to the Uniswap pool.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_raise_token_solvency() public view { if (!_launchSucceeded && !_refundTriggered) { assert(IERC20(RAISE_TOKEN).balanceOf(address(this)) >= totalRaised); } }

invariants.description: A position's current liquidity can never exceed its initially vested total liquidity.
invariants.attack_scenario: If current liquidity exceeds total liquidity, it implies a math error or exploit where users could claim more tokens than they are entitled to, draining the pool's assets.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_liquidity_bounds(uint256 tokenId) public view { assert(_positions[tokenId].liquidity <= _positionVests[tokenId].totalLiquidity); }

invariants.description: A user's total contributed ETH value must not exceed the maximum address cap.
invariants.attack_scenario: Whales could bypass the per-address cap, monopolizing the token sale, violating the fair distribution mechanics, and manipulating the ILO.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_max_address_cap(address user) public view { assert(_contributed[user] <= _maxAddressCap); }

invariants.description: If the pool has been successfully launched, the total raised amount must have met or exceeded the soft cap.
invariants.attack_scenario: If a pool launches without meeting the soft cap, it violates the economic guarantee provided to investors that the project will only proceed with sufficient funding.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_launch_soft_cap() public view { if (_launchSucceeded) { assert(totalRaised >= saleInfo.softCap); } }

invariants.description: Before any refunds are processed, the sum of raiseAmount across all user positions must exactly equal the totalRaised state variable.
invariants.attack_scenario: If totalRaised desyncs from actual user positions, the soft/hard cap checks can be bypassed, or the launch liquidity calculation will be incorrect, leading to a failed launch or stolen funds.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_total_raised_conservation() public view { if (!_refundTriggered) { uint256 sum = 0; for(uint256 i=1; i<_nextId; i++) { sum += _positions[i].raiseAmount; } assert(sum == totalRaised); } }

invariants.description: The calculated unlocked liquidity for any position must never exceed its total vested liquidity.
invariants.attack_scenario: If the vesting math overflows or calculates incorrectly, users could claim more liquidity than they own, draining the pool's Uniswap position.
invariants.solidity_property: function invariant_unlocked_liquidity_cap(uint256 tokenId) public view { assert(_unlockedLiquidity(tokenId) <= _positionVests[tokenId].totalLiquidity); }
